title: CROWDAQ moment event
description: Standalone notable-moment announcement (goal, red card, VAR, etc.). Emitted in addition to the score-update snapshot so the widget can overlay a dedicated celebration card for a few seconds without waiting for the next full snapshot.

event_id.description: CROWDAQ event id this moment belongs to. Same shape as score-update.event_id.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of when the moment was observed.

moment_type.description: Matches the enum used in score-update.last_moment.type.

description.description: Human-readable description. Upstream may exceed the widget's maxMomentLength; client truncates with trailing ellipsis.

media_url.description: Optional image or short-video URL for an overlay. Empty / absent when none.

player_or_actor.description: Optional player / actor involved (e.g. goal scorer, card recipient).

examples.description: Goal! Brazil equalise in the 78th minute — stadium erupts.
Yellow card shown to the Manchester City midfielder for a late tackle.
